title: Homes England RFI releases for July 2025
body: "You can read about the Freedom of Information (FOI) Act and how to make an information request at the bottom of the Homes England homepage.  The Freedom of Information Act 2000 and the Environmental Information Regulations 2004 require us to disclose information that is held at the time we receive a request. Information in our disclosure log is subject to change and information contained within a historic request may now be out of date. "
